# ROTO's TCG

## About
ROTO's TCG is a Pokémon Trading Card Game buying, selling, and trading business based in Toronto and Waterloo, Ontario, Canada. Founded by Ron Chai and Thomas Shivas.

## Services
- Buy Pokémon card collections from sellers across Ontario
- Sell Pokémon cards and sealed product at live events and online
- Trade Pokémon cards at events and in-person meetups
- Live breaks and auctions on Whatnot

## Areas Served
- Toronto, Ontario
- Waterloo, Ontario
- Greater Ontario region
- Online (Whatnot)

## How to Sell Your Cards
Visit https://rotostcg.ca/#sell to fill out the collection inquiry form. ROTO's reviews every submission personally and responds within 48 hours. Collections of all sizes are welcome.

## Events
ROTO's TCG sets up at card shows and conventions across Ontario including HobbyCon, NACE, CSC, Collectors Clash, Cardfesta, Mewtopia, and more.

## Links
- Website: https://rotostcg.ca
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/rotos_tcg/
- Whatnot: https://www.whatnot.com/s/sPpusQs4

## Contact
Use the form at https://rotostcg.ca/#sell or reach out via Instagram DM.
